testcase.name: test_project_list_GET

failure.message: AssertionError: No templates used to render the response

testcase.failure:
self = <app.tests.test_views.TestView testMethod=test_project_list_GET>
def test_project_list_GET(self): client = Client() response = client.get(reverse('post-create'), follow=True)
self.assertEquals(response.status_code, 200) #self.client.login(username='Sangu', password='123') print(response.__dict__) > self.assertTemplateUsed(response, 'app/post_form.html')
app\tests\test_views.py:27: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ env1\lib\site-packages\django\test\testcases.py:849: in assertTemplateUsed self._assert_template_used(template_name, template_names, msg_prefix, count) env1\lib\site-packages\django\test\testcases.py:813: in _assert_template_used self.fail(msg_prefix + "No templates used to render the response") E AssertionError: No templates used to render the response
testcase.system-out:
